svg.text: Material: ABS or ASA (3D printed) | Envelope: 220W x 4D x 400H mm | Scale noted per view
Cross-section at slot top edge | Scale 10:1
2. Cartridge slot: 148 x 84mm, centered in width,
3. 5mm chamfer (45 deg) on all slot entrance edges
4. Two display dock recesses: 50mm dia x 5mm deep.
Raised boss on exterior face to accommodate
5. Cable exit holes: 8mm dia through-holes centered
in each dock recess for flat Cat6 cable.
6. Status LED window: 6x6mm, translucent, at X=110
7. Attaches to main enclosure body front edge.
